task: Service-token auth middleware for service-to-service/cron HTTP calls. Daily smoke probe (read-only critical path checks). No migration. No financial writes.
details: apps/backend/src/auth/service-token.middleware.ts: requireServiceToken() — checks Authorization: Bearer $SERVICE_TOKEN_SECRET, 401 on mismatch, 503 if unconfigured.

apps/backend/src/admin/smoke-probe.routes.ts: GET /api/v1/internal/smoke-probe — service-token gated, read-only, 5 checks (db_ping, event_log_read, loads_read, invoices_read, spine_write_gate). 200/503.
apps/backend/src/middleware/response-time.ts: /api/v1/internal/perf-metrics now accepts service token OR session auth.
.env.example: SERVICE_TOKEN_SECRET documented with openssl rand -hex 32 instruction.
note: Final block. After merge + deploy-green the planned deferred build scope is complete.
